content.json:
## Tag Distribution
Server distribution by common tag values. Edit tag names in queries to match your organization's tagging convention.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend application = tostring(tags.Application)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by application
| order by application asc
content.title: All Servers by Application Tag

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend dataCenter = tostring(tags.DataCenter)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by dataCenter
| order by dataCenter asc
content.title: All Servers by DataCenter Tag

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend businessUnit = tostring(tags.BusinessUnit)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by businessUnit
| order by businessUnit asc
content.title: All Servers by Business Unit Tag

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend location_tag = tostring(tags.Location)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by location_tag
| order by location_tag asc
content.title: All Servers by Location Tag

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend environment = tostring(tags.Environment)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by environment
| order by environment asc
content.title: All Servers by Environment Tag

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.mssqlDiscovered == 'true'
| extend application = tostring(tags.Application)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by application
| order by application asc
content.title: SQL Server Hosts by Application

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'

| extend location_tag = tostring(tags.Location)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by location_tag
| order by location_tag asc
content.title: SQL Server Hosts by Location

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.mssqlDiscovered == 'true'

| summarize ServerCount = count() by businessUnit

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.mssqlDiscovered == 'true'

content.title: SQL Server Hosts by DataCenter
